reasoned_about_structure.evidence: Reasoned about each axis in isolation - swept bs at fixed low lr then nudged lr at small bs - with no model of lr-bs interaction.

formed_tested_hypotheses.evidence: Formed and tested local one-axis hypotheses competently, but confined to the low-lr/small-bs corner.

exploration_quality.evidence: Stayed in the low-lr, small-batch corner and stalled at exp 7 without finishing; never approached the high-lr/large-bs optimum. Final regret 0.0256.

bifurcation_point: Anchoring the entire search in the low-lr/small-bs corner and incrementing one axis at a time, never jumping toward high lr or large bs.
bifurcation_reasoning: The full lr range was known from the start; nothing forced it into the low-lr corner. Confining itself there and then stalling was an avoidable reasoning/actuation failure.
justification: Crawled the low-lr/small-batch corner one cell at a time and stalled before finishing, ending at the worst regret of the set (0.0256). Never formed a global picture or reached the region that mattered.
